problem.title: Count Submatrices With Equal Frequency of X and Y

approaches.title: 2D Prefix Sum with Tracking
approaches.summary: Initial solution using a 2D prefix sum grid to track cumulative sums and presence of 'X' in submatrices.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Implemented 2D prefix sum grid with Node struct to track sum and 'X' presence.

approaches.title: 1D Prefix Sum Optimization
approaches.summary: Optimized to use a 1D prefix sum array per row, reducing space complexity while maintaining correctness.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Converted 2D prefix grid to 1D prefix row, simplifying logic and reducing space usage.

approaches.title: Bounds Check Reduction
approaches.summary: Further optimized by eliminating redundant bounds checks and directly mutating the prefix array.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Reduced bounds checks by iterating over prefix_row directly and mutating in place.
